reason: Remediation involves deleting user accounts. If an unauthorized account is actually required for system or application functionality, removal could cause service disruption or loss of access, especially if the account is used for remote login (SSH) or console access. Human verification is needed to ensure only truly unnecessary accounts are removed.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential removal of needed service accounts; Possible loss of SSH or console access; Impact on applications relying on specific local users
